keyInformation.home: Argentina's 2022 match lens runs through Lionel Messi, Ángel Di María, and Paulo Dybala, based on the actual match roster. Against France, Argentina had to beat France's scoring threat through Kylian Mbappé. Their own route was turning Lionel Messi and Ángel Di María into the scoring route, and that route produced a 3-3 draw. The risk was that France had already shown the finish to make that pressure count.
keyInformation.away: France's 2022 match lens runs through Kylian Mbappé, Randal Kolo Muani, and Aurélien Tchouaméni, based on the actual match roster. Against Argentina, France had to beat Argentina's scoring threat through Lionel Messi and Ángel Di María. Their own route was turning Kylian Mbappé into the scoring route, and that route produced a 3-3 draw. The risk was that Argentina had already shown the finish to make that pressure count.

resultStoryBullets: Lionel Messi put Argentina in front before Kylian Mbappé answered for France.
The 3-3 grind stayed tense enough to leave the knockout tie to penalties.
Argentina were cleaner from the spot, winning the World Cup 2022 through the shootout 4-2 after the 3-3 draw.
